message:
Remove broken update-docs workflow

The workflow tried to trigger a non-existent `update.yaml` in
tenzir/docs with incorrect parameters. Docs rebuilds should be
triggered from tenzir/news after changelog syncs instead.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,22 +0,0 @@
-name: Update Docs
-
-on:
-  push:
-    branches:
-      - main
-
-jobs:
-  Trigger:
-    name: Trigger
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    permissions:
-      contents: read
-
-    steps:
-      - name: Trigger changelog update in tenzir/docs repository
-        env:
-          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_BOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
-        run: |
-          gh workflow run update.yaml \
-            --repo tenzir/docs \
-            --field product=node
